narrative:
Williamsburg Village A (precinct in Clermont County) has 779 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
